login.title: welcome back.
login.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password. Your scripts, products, and routine are waiting.
login.buyHint: Buy and get your password via email

forgot.title: forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: No worries. Drop your email and we'll send a link to create a new password.
forgot.successBody: If this email has an account on Método TTS, you'll receive it in a few seconds. Check your inbox and spam.

reset.title: new password
reset.subtitle: Pick a password you'll remember easily — minimum 8 characters.

welcome.title: welcome 💕
welcome.subtitle: Before we start, tell us a bit about yourself.
